examples: Objective To explore techniques of isolating embryonic stem-like cells (ESLCs) from mouse blastocyst inner cell mass and the utilization of ESLCs to generate chimerical mice.
In the past two weeks, it has looked as chimerical as ever.
But although the renewable-energy sector is growing by 30% a year, Mr Ritter's dream of making it the foundation of economic growth seems chimerical.
The prospect of drilling, digging, and shipping hydrocarbons is not chimerical, but a realistic near-term solution to the economic woes of both Ireland and America.
